revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Deprecated code]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2827 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<del class="deprecated-content {{{class|}}}" style="color:{{#if:{{{red|}}}|#8B0000|#808080}}; text-decoration:none; {{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}|}}" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|title="{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}"|}}>{{{1}}}</del><noinclude>
{{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

<del class="deprecated-content {{{class|}}}" style="color:{{#if:{{{red|}}}|#8B0000|#808080}}; text-decoration:none; {{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}|}}" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|title="{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}"|}}>{{{1}}}</del><noinclude>
{{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<del class="deprecated-content {{{class|}}}" style="color:{{#if:{{{red|}}}|#8B0000|#808080}}; text-decoration:none; {{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}|}}" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|title="{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}"|}}>{{{1}}}</del><noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Deprecated_code here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Deprecated_code for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <del class="deprecated-content {{{class|}}}" style="color:{{#if:{{{red|}}}|var(--color-content-removed, #8B0000)|var(--color-subtle, #54595d)}}; text-decoration:none; {{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}|}}" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|title="{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}"|}}>{{{1}}}</del><noinclude>
{{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Deprecated_code for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <del class="deprecated-content {{{class|}}}" style="color:{{#if:{{{red|}}}|var(--color-content-removed, #8B0000)|var(--color-subtle, #54595d)}}; text-decoration:none; {{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}|}}" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|}} {{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|title="{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}"|}}>{{{1}}}</del><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
